summary: Relax the no-squash rule for .todo/-only commits (resolution SHAs live in the ticket file)
description: The no-squash rule exists to preserve resolution SHAs, but those SHAs live inside the ticket file as resolution.commit, not in .todo/ commit history, so squashing .todo/-only commits loses nothing essential. Separate resolution provenance (in the file) from the transition log (open->active->done churn that pollutes main). Relax the rule and update docs. Files: BIBLE.md, skills/.
